Beside her, a man in a black shirt and hat consistently strums an acoustic guitar and sings into a stand microphone. The background features a metal truss structure, stage equipment including a "YAMAHA N7CL" amplifier, and a banner partially displaying "STEREO". The man occasionally glances toward the woman and smiles while playing. The camera framing shifts slightly left, revealing more of the rigging and equipment cases behind the performers.

The camera view tilts downward, revealing black stage monitors and a white metal barrier in the foreground which obscures most of the performers, with a "YAMAHA N7CL" equipment case and "STER" banner visible in the background.

Behind them, stage rigging and a banner with "STEREO" are visible. [36-38] The woman extends her left arm outward while holding a microphone in her right hand, as the man continues strumming the guitar and singing.

From 12s to 14s, a woman wearing a black hat and sleeveless top faces the left side of the stage holding a microphone, while beside her, a man in a black shirt and hat strums an acoustic guitar and sings into a stand microphone near a background banner displaying 'STEREO'. By 38s, the woman, now seen in a patterned top, holds a microphone near her mouth with her right hand and extends her left arm outward. The man continues strumming and singing. Between 40s and 42s, she holds the microphone stand with her left hand while singing into the handheld mic. Finally, from 42s to 44s, the woman stands stage left with her left arm down, holding the mic in her right hand, as the man continues to perform beside her near the stage rigging and a banner partially showing 'STER'.

[52-54] The camera pans left, focusing on the woman singing near green trees and a white stage support structure, moving away from the guitarist.

[54-56] A woman wearing a black hat and patterned vest turns from facing left to forward, gripping a microphone with both hands near her mouth near a white stage support with green trees in the background, while a man's arm and guitar appear partially at the frame's edge. [56-62] She turns to face left, holding the microphone in her right hand, now clearly wearing a tan vest and leopard print scarf. The guitarist is no longer visible, leaving the focus on the singer against metal rigging with blue lights and green trees as she continues her performance in a medium shot.

[66-70] The view widens to show a man in a black hat and shirt on the right playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a stand microphone. The woman remains on the left singing. Metal stage rigging and lights are visible in the background behind the duo.

Beside her, a man in a black shirt and hat strums an acoustic guitar and sings into a stand microphone. Metal stage rigging and lights are visible in the background. [74-78] The woman extends her left arm outward to the side, then lowers it. The man continues strumming and singing, smiling slightly. Stage equipment labeled 'YAMAHA N7CL' and 'nord stage' is visible near the performers.

[78-80] A woman in a black hat and tan vest sings into a handheld microphone on the left beside a man in a black hat and shirt playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a stand microphone. [80-82] The camera zooms in on the man, excluding the woman, as he sings and holds the guitar neck. [82-86] The man continues performing in a steady medium shot, singing with eyes closed then slightly open against a background of metal stage rigging and a colorful banner with abstract orange and white shapes.
